query:
SELECT 
  emissorNome, codigoCetip, indexador,
  CAST(taxaIndicativa AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as taxa,
  CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as zspread_bps,
  CAST(ntnbTaxa AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as ntnbTaxa,
  ntnbReferencia,
  CAST(durationAnos AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as duration,
  incentivado, rating
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE zspread IS NOT NULL
  AND indexador LIKE '%IPCA%'
ORDER BY zspread DESC
LIMIT 5;
